description_long: This is a small, round table with a sleek, minimalist design. The tabletop is a solid, circular disk with a glossy black finish, giving it a modern and polished appearance. The table is supported by three slender, slightly curved legs that are evenly spaced and connect directly to the underside of the tabletop. The legs are also black and appear to be made of metal, contributing to the table's sturdy yet lightweight construction. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features, emphasizing its utilitarian and contemporary style. This table would be suitable for use in urban parks, sidewalks, or modern public spaces.
description: A small, round, glossy black table with three slender metal legs and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and three evenly spaced, curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature and spacing of the legs beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with the same leg arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the round top and three curved legs.
